emails.subject: Meeting with Chris Sherman
emails.body: Meeting with Chris Sherman Chris Sherman wants to set up a meeting with you next Tuesday afternoon. What times are you available and is that a good time for you? Thanks.

emails.subject: Meeting with Chris Sherman

emails.subject: Re: Meeting with Chris Sherman
emails.body: Re: Meeting with Chris Sherman Any time after 1 pm works for me. Rae Meadows/ENRON@enronXgate 05/17/2001 02:07 PM
